rationale: Selected because BTC econ_calendar collapsed 52.7%->32.4% and XAG momentum_factors collapsed 63.4%->37.1% — worst signal degradations today

key_predictive_features: MVRV Z-Score: historically identifies cycle peaks within 2 weeks (84.3% accuracy for macro positioning)
SOPR (Spent Output Profit Ratio): profit/loss of average seller — leading indicator of capitulation
Exchange net flows: BTC leaving exchanges = accumulation; entering = distribution
ETF flows: May 2026 saw -$2.3B outflows (worst month 2026) — strong short-term predictor
Funding rates + options skew: derivatives positioning signals regime shifts
Fear & Greed Index at 23 (Extreme Fear) — historically contrarian BUY zone when sustained 2+ weeks
fundamental_drivers: Post-halving cycle: Apr 2024 halving -> expected peak Q2-Q4 2026 per historical analogs
ETF institutional demand: structural floor but outflows indicate institution rotation to AI/equities
MSTR treasury effect: 843,706 BTC on balance sheet; first sale in 4 years spooked sentiment
Dollar strength: stronger USD = BTC headwind (inverse correlation ~-0.65 over 90d)
Fed policy: no cuts yet, but 8-4 dissent at May FOMC signals eventual pivot
seasonal_patterns: June historically mixed for BTC: +2.1% average but high variance
Q3 tends to be strongest quarter in post-halving years
Liquidation cascades cluster around options expiry (last Friday of month)
papers_and_models: ScienceDirect 2025: on-chain features + feature selection outperforms price/volume-only models
Multi-signal framework: MVRV+SOPR+exchange_flows = 84.3% cycle positioning accuracy
PPO-based adaptive alpha weighting (ArXiv 2509.01393): RL dynamically adjusts signal weights
HMM regime detection for crypto (Preprints 202603.0831): Bayesian non-homogeneous transition probs
recommended_new_signals: ETF_flow_momentum: 5d MA of daily ETF net flows — direct institutional demand signal
Options_skew_regime: put/call skew z-score as regime switch indicator
MSTR_premium_discount: MSTR market cap vs BTC NAV — proxy for institutional BTC sentiment
Liquidation_cascade_risk: aggregate open interest * leverage as crash probability
deep_dives.implementation_notes: BTC econ_calendar collapsed because FOMC proximity signal fires false BUYs during sustained downtrends. Fix: add regime gate — suppress econ_calendar BUY when drift_regime_gate says trending-down. The signal works for mean-reversion (ranging) but not in trending markets.

key_predictive_features: Gold-silver ratio: currently compressed toward 60 (from 90); reversion target 50 = $120 silver
COMEX inventories: -31% drop to 366M oz — physical supply crunch
COT managed money positioning: net long only 5,472 contracts — very low, room to expand
Industrial demand: solar panel silver usage +15% YoY, EV demand growing
Central bank gold buying: 585t/quarter — silver follows gold with leverage
USD/DXY inverse: stronger dollar suppresses, weaker dollar turbocharges
fundamental_drivers: Supply deficit: mine output declining while demand rising (both investment + industrial)
COMEX tightness: open interest exceeds available metal 4x — potential short squeeze
Green energy transition: solar panels alone consume ~150M oz/year
Geopolitical premium: war + Hormuz risk = safe haven bid
Central bank diversification: gold buying record supports silver spillover
seasonal_patterns: Silver strongest Q1 and Q4 historically
Late June identified as potential inflection zone per historical analogs
Mine supply seasonal: lower output Dec-Feb (Southern hemisphere off-season)
Indian wedding season (Oct-Dec) drives physical demand
papers_and_models: COMEX inventory depletion model: 366M oz declining at ~10M/month = critical by Q4
Gold-silver ratio mean reversion: ratio below 60 -> silver outperforms gold 2:1
COT extreme positioning: when managed money net long < 10K contracts, 30d forward return +4.2% avg
recommended_new_signals: COMEX_inventory_velocity: rate of change of COMEX silver stocks — leading indicator of squeeze
Gold_silver_ratio_momentum: z-score of ratio RoC — capture rotation from gold to silver
COT_extreme_positioning: flag when managed money net long < 10K contracts
Solar_demand_proxy: solar ETF (TAN) momentum as proxy for silver industrial demand
deep_dives.implementation_notes: XAG momentum_factors collapsed because the signal uses fixed lookback periods that fail during range-bound chop. Fix: make lookback period adaptive based on regime (shorter in trending, longer in ranging). Also consider regime-gating momentum_factors to suppress in ranging regimes where mean-reversion signals dominate.
